sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78864" key="parasfagi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρασφᾰγίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n78864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the part near the throat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:133" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.133</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
